commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7597d76b5c2b143b6aaa039d3ddf5bd7c838cd95)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes `handleGatewayRequest` to always rebuild the gateway method registry from the live plugin registry and adds a regression test for stale startup registry dispatch.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +71. Total +72 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source and tests show the supplied attached registry can be intentionally newer than global runtime state, and the PR would ignore it.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor and maintainer action is needed because the external proof gate is still mock-only and the code repair must preserve current-main registry semantics.

target.title: fix(gateway): resolve plugin-registered gateway methods through live registry
target.body:
## Summary

- **Problem**: `openclaw gateway call <plugin-method>` returns `INVALID_REQUEST: unknown method` for plugin gateway methods registered via `api.registerGatewayMethod()`, even though `plugins inspect --runtime` confirms the registration.
- **Root cause**: `handleGatewayRequest()` preferred `opts.methodRegistry`, a startup-time snapshot passed from the WS handler. Plugin methods registered after that snapshot (hot-load / late-init) lived only in the live active plugin registry, so dispatch never reached them.
- **Fix**: Always build the per-request registry via `createRequestGatewayMethodRegistry()`, which reads `getPluginRegistryState().activeRegistry`.
- **Regression test**: `src/gateway/server-methods.plugin-gateway-dispatch.test.ts` dispatches `demo.ping` while passing an empty stale `methodRegistry`, reproducing the startup-snapshot miss.

Closes #94127

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed**: Plugin-registered gateway RPC methods must resolve through the live plugin registry even when callers pass a stale startup `methodRegistry` snapshot.
- **Real environment tested**: Linux WSL2, Node 22, source checkout on this branch (`8efcc991054`).
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods.plugin-gateway-dispatch.test.ts
```

- **Evidence after fix**:

```text
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8 /home/princeht/fire_project/openclaw


 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  2 passed (2)
   Start at  21:30:58
   Duration  1.23s (transform 429ms, setup 331ms, import 530ms, tests 108ms, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 14.07s
```

- **Observed result after fix**: Regression test passes: `handleGatewayRequest` invokes the live `demo.ping` handler and responds `{ ok: true, ts: 42 }` despite an empty stale `methodRegistry` argument mirroring the startup snapshot path.
- **What was not tested**: Live gateway end-to-end with real plugin install + `openclaw gateway call` on a running gateway process.

## Verification

- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods.plugin-gateway-dispatch.test.ts`
target.author: pick-cat
